objective: Implement SPEC-before-code workpack readiness, traceability, Skill binding, and candidate boundary primitives from P1-SPEC-08 without adding product capability.
implemented_capabilities: Workpack readiness state computation for missing SPEC_LOCK, output family lock gaps, traceability findings, scope disputes, invalidation, and ready execution state.
Candidate envelope emission that explicitly remains not approved, not promoted, and not locked.
Code target map validation for required fields, one implementation duty per row, required validator check IDs, allowed path scope, forbidden path rejection, and declared dependency edge types.
Test obligation matrix validation for trace-row parity, validator check binding, positive and negative test obligations, and acceptance command binding.
Orphan code target detection so implementation files cannot be promoted without current traceability rows.

Skill binding manifest validation for version/source identity, bound SPEC_LOCKs, allowed and forbidden paths, allowed commands, trace rows, validators, tests, Human Gate, and invalidation dependencies.
Skill drift and SPEC_LOCK drift validators that block use unless a structured unaffected claim is supplied.
Skill text second-authority detection for text that tries to override spec, validator, review, promotion, or acceptance authority.
Required workpack, traceability, skill binding, exception, matrix, index, and readiness report schemas.
Positive and negative tests for workpack generation, code target map, test matrix, Skill binding, invalidation propagation, and schema presence.
Review repair: workpack readiness now fails closed on allowed and forbidden path scope violations.
Review repair: test obligation matrix parity now rejects extra or duplicate matrix rows.
Review repair: malformed Skill lock binding records now return validator findings instead of runtime exceptions.
Review repair: implementation workpack schema now rejects undeclared top-level fields.

deferred_due_scope.item: Repository-wide generation of real workpack index data from every P1 obligation
deferred_due_scope.reason: This workpack implements harness primitives and schemas; mass extraction and population belongs to a separate execution package.
P1-SPEC-08 treats Skill binding as controlled metadata; this implementation validates binding records without modifying the forbidden skills directory.

deferred_due_scope.item: Human Gate final approval, promotion, and BUILD_LOCK creation
deferred_due_scope.reason: The workpack cannot approve, promote, or lock its own candidate output.
